title: clinogyne leucantha
intro: Clinogyne leucantha, also known as White-Flowered Clinogyne, is a plant species within the mint family (Lamiaceae) that is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Clinogyne leucantha has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating gastrointestinal problems. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
